item.description:
DriveBuddy 1.1.9

A big stability and performance update.

Improved

  • Better stability — fewer freezes and hangs when launching, connecting drives, scanning, searching, and browsing.
  • Nicknames save reliably, including on ExFAT and numbered drives.
  • Smarter search — finds files nested deep on a drive, ranks the best match first, and jumps to the drive when you click a result.
  • More reliable scan-complete notifications.
  • Import and export no longer freeze the app, and show progress.
  • Large drives open faster and use less memory.

New

  • Eject drives right from DriveBuddy.
